UD JURY TRIALS

Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present and in Pro Per.
Defendants Nicole Christina Binger and Michael Joseph Stillman are present.
Attorney Tai Hsia representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of OCT-15-2012 is vacated.
